framework.name: Layered Authorization Stack for AI Agents
framework.description: OAuth 2.1 as base layer + policy-as-code (OPA/Cedar) for runtime constraints + delegation-aware tokens (RAR/RFC 9396, Token Exchange/RFC 8693) + runtime attestation (DPoP, SPIFFE). Paper argues no single primitive suffices — you need the stack.
framework.raw_quote: securing AI agents requires a layered authorization stack that extends beyond OAuth alone
